raw_consumer_statement: I booked a trip to XXXX, XXXX, and second week of XX/XX/year> and round-trip airfare tickets. The airline tickets were refunded by XXXX XXXX however XXXX I booked a week stay at a hotel they are third-party vendor. I also purchased their online insurance in the end found out they are very fraudulent as I had to cancel my trip. I was going to get married, but that did not happen. They had 10 days to refund my money The airline refunded my money immediately XXXX however gave me a bunch of bylaws and small print showing that my reason for cancellation was not valid and therefore would not refund my money and if I cancel or forfeit my reservation, they will still keep my money. Their online insurance does not disclose what is covered, but they do in the beginning. Say it is recommended to protect your interest of refund finding out that their interest is there is no interest that no matter what you do is a consumer you will not get your money. They are very well documented out of the state of California New York for fraud and overcharging and adding on excessive fees And it seems that no one has stop this company. I have Citibank through XXXX. Airlines turned in my dispute as I never did use this transaction asked for a refund of {$1300.00}. They dispute it three times. The vendor has denied to refund the money without probable cause a reason I also try through the vendor myself. They have all the evidence of what happened and all my cancellation flights, etc. so does Citibank Citibank said that theres nothing more that they can do its my problem now that I have to deal with the vendor. Ive already dealt with the vendor now multiple times And they give me the same response. Ive reported them to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Ive also now Im complaining to you regarding the same situation with Citibankand XXXX  Ive also complained to the Texas Attorney Generals office and my last action would be small claims court, which will be difficult because theyre out of state. I would love to be refunded my money as Citibank basically did not support me at all immediately decided with the vendor and said theres nothing more they can do when they did not do anything at all. Im very upset and do not want to pay for something I never used
